name: Bubbly Kissing Submerging
descrip: Force an intoxicating aphrodisiac into your prey.
outcome: While [AttackerName] is lovingly making out with [TargetName], [AttackerHeOrShe] easily draws [TargetHimOrHer] deeper into the slimy pool, gradually submerging [TargetHisOrHer] body as she forces [TargetHimOrHer] to drink her fizzing 'saliva'.
miss: [AttackerName] tries to keep [TargetName] locked in a deep kiss, but [TargetHeOrShe] somehow manages to squirm away for a moment!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] can feel the goo [TargetHeOrShe]'s drinking slowly filling [TargetHisOrHer] body with a horny daze as it fizzes and pops inside [TargetHimOrHer].
